mapper.insert: INSERT INTO member (ID, PASSWORD, NICKNAME, BIRTH_DATE, GENDER) VALUES (#{id}, #{password}, #{nickname}, #{birthDate}, #{gender})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member WHERE ID = #{ID}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member WHERE NICKNAME = #{NICKNAME}
mapper.update: UPDATE member SET NICKNAME = #{NICKNAME} WHERE ID = #{ID}
UPDATE member SET PROFILE_IMG = #{PROFILE_IMG} WHERE ID = #{ID}
UPDATE member SET INTRO = #{intro} WHERE ID = #{id}
UPDATE member SET SCRAP_PUBLIC = #{scrapPublic} WHERE ID = #{id}
mapper.delete: DELETE pl FROM post_like pl INNER JOIN post p ON p.POST_ID = pl.POST_ID WHERE p.WRITER_ID = #{ID}
DELETE pc FROM post_comment pc INNER JOIN post p ON p.POST_ID = pc.POST_ID WHERE p.WRITER_ID = #{ID}
mapper.select: SELECT ID, NICKNAME, PROFILE_IMG FROM member WHERE CONCAT(ID, ' ', NICKNAME) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') AND ID != 'Admin' AND STATUS = 'ACTIVE' LIMIT 20

SELECT ID as id, PASSWORD as password, BALANCE as balance, NICKNAME as nickname, BIRTH_DATE AS birthDate, GENDER AS gender, PROFILE_IMG as profileImg, INTRO as intro, STATUS AS status, FOLLOWING_COUNT as followingCount, FOLLOWER_COUNT as followerCount, SCRAP_PUBLIC as scrapPublic, SNS_YOUTUBE as snsYoutube, SNS_INSTAGRAM as snsInstagram, SNS_FACEBOOK as snsFacebook FROM member WHERE BINARY ID = #{id} AND STATUS = 'ACTIVE'
